result.description: Tojo's Restaurant is a renowned Japanese fine dining restaurant in Vancouver, Canada. result.description: Chambar is Vancouver’s top destination for modern casual dining. We offer fresh, local ingredients, Belgian-inspired cuisine, and a chic yet inviting atmosphere.
